description: Build and scale payment infrastructure handling millions of transactions daily. Work with distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput APIs. Lead backend architecture decisions for core payment flows.
Develop ML infrastructure and API services for Indic language models. Build scalable inference pipelines and model serving systems using Python and cloud-native technologies.
Architect and build core transaction processing systems for India's largest digital payments platform. Drive technical excellence in distributed systems and database optimization.
Build low-latency trading systems and market data pipelines. Work on order management, risk systems, and real-time data processing for millions of traders.
Develop logistics and delivery optimization systems. Build real-time tracking, routing algorithms, and partner integration APIs for food delivery platform.
Build investing platform services for millions of users. Work on order management, portfolio systems, and integrations with exchanges and payment gateways.
